tasks.label: Validate Instruction Files
tasks.command: Get-ChildItem -Path "instructions" -Recurse -Filter "*.md" | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Validating: $($_.FullName)"; if ((Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw).Length -gt 1000) { Write-Host "✓ Valid length" -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host "⚠ Short file" -ForegroundColor Yellow } }
